description: A lightweight SDK and documentation package for TI MSPM0G3507 microcontrollers, including DriverLib sources, RTOS integration files, device notes, and LQFP-48/LQFP-64 pin mapping documentation.
rules: Treat .syscfg files as the source of truth for generated MSPM0 pin, clock, interrupt, and peripheral configuration when present.
Prefer TI DriverLib and local wrapper APIs over ad hoc register access in examples and explanations.
Use include/ for public interfaces and source/ for implementation details; keep paired headers and sources consistent.
Use doc/MSPM0G3507 LQFP-48 引脚功能表.md and doc/MSPM0G3507 LQFP-64 引脚功能表.md for package-specific pin mapping notes.
Do not treat generated build outputs, object files, map files, binaries, IDE metadata, or version-control metadata as source documentation.
When summarizing C/C++ APIs, preserve exact macro names, function names, interrupt names, and device identifiers.
